text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I drop by the cafeteria for a breather, when...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
McQueen! How does it feel to win the spring
Tenno Sho crown twice in a row?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I suppose it feels... delightful. I'm pleased I could
rise to the expectations of the Mejiro family, my
team, and my fans.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Okay, me! My turn to ask a question!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: I wanna ask something too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Um… Hey now…

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What's the haps? Oh, it's just you, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Guess the spotlight's on you for holding onto the
Tenno Sho crown. Give it up for our Star
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... And here comes someone who surely spells trouble...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Easy now, champ! I'm always on your side, so let
me handle this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, y'all! We're doing this in turns—wait
first before asking a question! Let's start with you
over there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you intend to keep the questions coming
in...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Um, did you feel a lot of pressure to keep the
Tenno Sho crown?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... There were times when everyone's
expectations put me under quite a bit of stress.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, I realized that those expectations were
in truth a show of trust.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This change of perspective transformed what was
once pressure into a powerful ally.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Wow! So that pressure ended up helping you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hear that? Now there's a quote for the ages! Give her a round of applause!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right! McQueen has acquired the secret
technique to turn the pressure of expectations
into strength!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure why you need to reiterate the point,
but I suppose so.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The McQueen that lies before you makes strength
out of expectations—ready to overcome any
hardships that may arise!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
In fact! With all of your expectations, she could
even polish off a plate of this cafe's famous
Megaton Spicy Flamin' Hot Curry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what in the world are you saying?! That's
complete nonsense!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: This I gotta see!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Please, don't look at me so expectantly!
